description: Payment confirmation or receipt — extract transaction ID, amounts, and parties

fields.name: payer_name
fields.prompt: Extract the name of the person or entity who made the payment. Return null if not stated.

fields.name: payee_name
fields.prompt: Extract the name of the person or entity who received the payment.

fields.name: payment_date
fields.prompt: Extract the payment date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

fields.name: amount
fields.prompt: Extract the payment amount as a plain number.

fields.name: currency
fields.prompt: Extract the 3-letter ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. GBP, USD, EUR).

fields.name: payment_method
fields.prompt: Extract the payment method: 'bank_transfer', 'card', 'cash', 'direct_debit', 'standing_order', 'paypal', 'cheque', or describe other methods.
